compiled_state.title: As a developer, INSTALL.md is restructured into Required and Optional-by-stack sections
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Restructure INSTALL.md into two sections: Required (applies to all stacks) and Optional-by-stack (stack-specific tools and setup steps for Python, Node/JS, Ruby, Rust, and Java). This SC is deferrable without blocking epic closure if Epics A and B have not yet merged.

**Why**: The current INSTALL.md does not distinguish which setup steps are universal and which are stack-specific. Developers setting up a Ruby project have to mentally filter out Python setup steps.

**Scope**:
- IN: INSTALL.md restructured with ## Required and ## Optional (by stack) sections; each stack's optional tooling (lizard, jscpd, language-specific linters) listed under its stack subsection; note that this SC is deferrable if A+B not merged
- OUT: Generating new docs; changing content in other files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, INSTALL.md has a clear ## Required section (tools needed for all stacks) and a ## Optional (by stack) section with subsections for each supported stack
  ← Satisfies: "INSTALL.md restructured into Required vs Optional-by-stack sections"
- When this story is complete, the restructured INSTALL.md correctly identifies stack-specific tools (e.g., lizard/jscpd as Optional for stacks that use them, not Required for all stacks)
  ← Satisfies: documentation accuracy

## Considerations

- [Reliability] This SC is deferrable without blocking epic closure if Epics A and B have not merged — if A+B are not yet complete, note the dependency in the story's done-definition comment rather than blocking epic closure
- [Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Story complete: task f4a5-3a55 closed, INSTALL.md restructured.
comments.author: Test
